Curriculum About

Unit 1 Knowledge Check

10 questions • ~10 minutes

These questions test your understanding of the key concepts from Unit 1. Aim for at least 8/10 to proceed to Unit 2.

Question 1 of 10
According to McKinsey's "State of Marketing" survey, what efficiency gains are the top-performing 6% of companies achieving?
Question 2 of 10
The "10x PMM" model described in this unit emphasizes what fundamental shift?
Question 3 of 10
In the AI Impact Matrix, which activity has the LOWEST AI impact percentage (most human-led)?
Question 4 of 10
According to the unit, why is "80%" used as the threshold for AI impact analysis?
Question 5 of 10
At the AWARENESS stage, what is the key adaptation required for Content Strategy?
Question 6 of 10
Why does Positioning & Messaging have a relatively LOW AI impact score (28%) despite content creation being HIGH impact?
Question 7 of 10
At the DECISION stage, which activity remains "human-led" with only 9% AI impact?
Question 8 of 10
The unit distinguishes between "Production Work" and "Strategic Work." Which statement best describes the PMM's role in Production Work?
Question 9 of 10
According to the funnel mapping, why is Analyst Relations (65% AI impact) still strategically important at the CONSIDERATION stage?
Question 10 of 10
The Pragmatic Institute framework organizes PMM work into 37 activities across 6 categories. Why does the unit recommend using this framework for AI impact analysis?
0/10

Continue Learning

← Back to Unit 1
